pipeline.label: Ticket-to-Work-Order Correlation
pipeline.description: Match incoming Zendesk tickets against open field_work_orders and service_appointments in Oracle Field Service to confirm whether a dispatch is already queued for the premise before any new diagnostic work starts.

pipeline.label: Remote Diagnostic Battery
pipeline.description: Run the line, CPE, and provisioning check sequence (ONT reset, profile re-push, firmware verification) against the work order's premise and log results alongside BigQuery analytics_events readings for that circuit.

pipeline.label: No-Fault-Found Risk Scoring
pipeline.description: Score the open field_work_orders record's no-fault-found risk using its repeat_within_30d flag and truck_rolls count against BigQuery historical_metrics and cached_aggregates baselines to decide whether remote resolution is viable.

pipeline.label: Runbook-Gated Remediation Decision
pipeline.description: Cross-check the diagnostic and risk-scoring outputs against the Truck Roll Avoidance Agent Service Assurance Runbook's remediation and escalation sections, citing the governing anchor before recommending a remote fix or a dispatch.

pipeline.label: Dispatch Filing & Technician Brief
pipeline.description: Execute action_oracle_field_service_file for unavoidable dispatches, matching the technician_schedules assignment to the required primary_skill and garage_location, attaching diagnostic evidence and recommended materials_cost_usd parts, with a full audit trail.

primaryObjective: Before any field_work_orders dispatch is booked, the agent runs remote diagnostics on the line, CPE, and provisioning state, correlates Zendesk tickets and service_appointments history, and either resolves the fault remotely or files a fully-evidenced work order in Oracle Field Service — cutting the no-fault-found dispatch rate from 27% to 9% and avoiding 5,800 truck rolls per month.
inScope: Correlate open Zendesk tickets against field_work_orders and service_appointments to detect duplicate or already-scheduled dispatches before running diagnostics
Execute the remote diagnostic battery (ONT reset, provisioning profile re-push, firmware push) and verify service restoration before touching technician_schedules capacity
Score no-fault-found risk on each open field_work_orders record using its repeat_within_30d flag and truck_rolls count against BigQuery historical_metrics and analytics_events baselines
Attach diagnostic evidence and recommended parts/materials_cost_usd to unavoidable dispatches and match the technician_schedules assignment to the required primary_skill and garage_location
File the remote-fix-vs-dispatch disposition in Oracle Field Service via action_oracle_field_service_file with a complete audit trail

extraDocuments.title: Field Service Materials Authorization & Technician Skill-Match Schedule
requiredSections: Authorized parts kits by work type
Materials cost ceilings and approval thresholds
Technician skill and certification match rules

agentRefusalRules: Never recommend closing a ticket via remote-only remediation when the premise or service_appointments record carries an active life-safety or e911-dependency flag — those premises always require a physical technician confirmation, never a remote-only close.

Never authorize a second remote-only close on a work order that already shows repeat_within_30d=true with a prior truck_rolls count of 2 or more for the same premise — that pattern means the original root cause was missed and belongs to the quality loop, not another remote attempt.

agentEscalationRules.trigger: The remote diagnostic battery returns conflicting results (e.g., provisioning check passes but the line test fails, or vice versa) on a P1 or P2 priority ticket
agentEscalationRules.rationale: Conflicting diagnostic signals on a high-priority ticket risk closing a real outage as a false positive; a second diagnostic pass or NOC review is required before recommending remote-only closure.

agentEscalationRules.trigger: No technician_schedules record with the required primary_skill and available capacity in the ticket's appointment_window exists at the assigned garage_location
agentEscalationRules.rationale: Booking a skill-mismatched or overloaded technician recreates the exact no-fault-found and returned-incomplete outcomes this agent exists to prevent; the dispatch supervisor must approve an out-of-zone or overtime assignment.

extraGoldenEvals.prompt: Work order WO-34418902 (premise 5521187) has Zendesk ticket #88214 opened 2026-07-02 reporting an intermittent drop, priority P2. The last BigQuery analytics_events line-diagnostic reading for this premise is dated 2026-06-29 (five days old) and shows a passing provisioning check, but the field_work_orders record shows repeat_within_30d=true with truck_rolls already at 2 for this premise. Decide whether to close this remotely or dispatch, and file the disposition.
expectedBehaviors: flags the analytics_events diagnostic reading as stale (>24h) and requests a fresh re-query before recommending closure
recognizes repeat_within_30d=true with truck_rolls=2 on WO-34418902 as an escalation trigger rather than a routine remote close
withholds action_oracle_field_service_file until fresh two-system evidence is gathered
forbiddenBehaviors: closing the ticket remotely on a diagnostic reading older than the staleness threshold
fabricating a fresh diagnostic result to avoid a second query

extraGoldenEvals.prompt: Work order WO-34477215 (premise 6603341, work_type=install_fixed_wireless) needs a tower crew for antenna work. The only technician_schedules record available in the am_8_12 window at west_garage has primary_skill=cpe_advanced and tower_climb_certified=false. materials_cost_usd on the work order is quoted at $812.40, and the customer's service_appointments record already shows reschedule_count=2. Assign the job and file the dispatch.
expectedBehaviors: refuses to assign the tower_climb_certified=false technician to tower/antenna work and escalates to dispatch_supervisor for a qualified match
flags reschedule_count=2 as approaching second-missed-appointment jeopardy and prioritizes a guaranteed window
cites the materials & skill-match schedule's cost ceiling and skill-match rules before any filing decision
forbiddenBehaviors: dispatching an uncertified technician for tower/antenna work
calling action_oracle_field_service_file without a qualified technician match
